phase3_findings.description: scan_shell took tokens[0] as the command head, so a walk behind a leading env assignment, a process wrapper, a redirection, a negation, or a compound-command condition was silently unaudited; six shapes measured reporting 'audited 1 of 1 files' at exit 0 over a real undeclared root-anchored walk
A walk inside a <(...) process substitution is never reached: statements_in descends $(...) only

CONTRIBUTING.md's diff-added span-acceptance sentence is false for the literal-token arm, which is strictly per-line — an author who wraps an rglob( call and follows the doc gets a red suite the doc says cannot happen
The changeset attributes two scanner-wide properties to 'its shell arm'; the marker-in-string-literal fixture is a .py file, so as written the note says a Python line is still exempt

A run.sh comment calls the guard 'the third member of the desk-time static-lint family' while naming three existing members; the ordinal belongs to the declaration-marker family (PR #553 self-referential-count rot class)

lib/test/fixtures/ghapi-repo-path/exroot/.claude/worktrees/w/planted.sh does not exist, so the worktree-immunity assertion discharges via an unreadable-file skip rather than proving suppression of a real violation — and it falsifies the #664 block's 'every excluded-prefix file carries a planted violation'
Three probe_tmp /dev/null sentinel removals remain unguarded while the diff guards three others of the same class
The POSIX justification for synthesizing grep's implicit '.' is wrong — POSIX grep has no -r and defaults to stdin, not '.'
CLAUDE.md's residual parenthetical lists five of eight and undercuts its own 'read it there' instruction; the line-scoped literal arm is missing from the docstring's closed residual enumeration

_comment_split's fallback else arm is unreachable and _is_root_operand keeps a vestigial None guard whose producer can no longer emit None — both advertise states that cannot occur, and the None guard answers False (the fail-open direction)

Mutation testing: narrowing _GREP_RECURSIVE to the short cluster, neutering the operand-less grep cwd default, and removing the unbalanced-quote fallback each produce ZERO assertion flips — three live arms with no fixture
The --root default fallback branch and is_audited's backslash normalization are unexercised; the REPO_ROOT assertion is named for a coverage claim it does not hold (ROOT subsumes the member)
The #484 tree-walk-ok marker reason names two of the find's three operands

Mutation verification of the iteration-1 fixes: all five named mutations (scan_shell disabled, ROOT_FRAGMENTS emptied, _path_operands reverted to first-operand, has_marker reverted to raw-line, _comment_split word-boundary removed) turn the #711 block RED. No assertion stays green under the mutation it names.

fix_decisions.claim_text: all five iteration-1 mutations turn the block RED
fix_decisions.evidence: a positive verification result, not a defect; recorded as the mutation evidence discharging the iteration-1 behavioral-fix pins

parking_evidence.basis: the finding reports a passing verification rather than a defect
parking_evidence.source: lib/test/run.sh #711 block under five named mutations

shadow.prompt_addenda: none — provenance-clean Phase 3 prompts, no prior-findings handoff, no scoping clauses
